query: INSERT INTO establishments (name, userId, isOpen, street, city, state) SELECT 'Restaurante Kelri', u.id, 1, 'Rua das Flores', 'São Paulo', 'SP' FROM users u WHERE u.name = 'Kelri Brito' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM establishments e WHERE e.userId = u.id);
